# ran

> ran is an open-source front-end ecosystem by chaxus: **ranui**, a Web Components UI
> library, and **ranuts**, a utility library — plus low-level web-infrastructure
> experiments (a JS parser, a JSX compiler, a WASM/2D rendering engine). This site
> documents ranui and ranuts.

ranui is built on native Custom Elements (`<r-*>` tags), so it works in any framework
or plain HTML. It ships first-class TypeScript types, light/dark theming via Geist-based
CSS variables, Shadow DOM encapsulation, SSR/SSG support, and PWA. ranuts is a broad,
tree-shakeable collection: DOM/BOM, string/object/number/color helpers, algorithms, a
2D rendering engine (Canvas/WebGL/WebGPU), a virtual DOM, and Node server tooling.

## Docs

- [ranui — Web Components UI library](https://ran.chaxus.com/src/ranui/): button, input, select, checkbox, radio, card, tabs, modal, popover, dropdown, progress, message, icon, and more `<r-*>` elements, with theming and SSR
- [ranuts — utility library](https://ran.chaxus.com/src/ranuts/): functional (debounce, throttle, memoize, compose), string/object/number/color utils, a 2D rendering engine, virtual DOM, TOTP
- [Articles](https://ran.chaxus.com/src/article/design_mode): design-pattern and front-end engineering notes (parsers, compilers, bundlers, TypeScript, algorithms)

## Reference

- [Full documentation corpus for LLMs](https://ran.chaxus.com/llms-full.txt): every doc page concatenated as plain text
- [Sitemap — all pages](https://ran.chaxus.com/sitemap.xml)
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/chaxus/ran)
- [ranui on npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/ranui)
- [ranuts on npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/ranuts)

## Optional

- [简体中文文档 (Simplified Chinese docs)](https://ran.chaxus.com/cn/)
